message:
refactor(advanced): make compute_top_k_set pub directly, drop redundant wrapper

Previous commit added `compute_top_k_set_public` as a thin wrapper
around the private `compute_top_k_set`. The wrapper is dead weight —
there's no reason to keep two names for the same function. Just mark
`compute_top_k_set` pub and have the Analyzer method call it directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
